goal.name: main'vc.9
goal.expl: a.{i} := (i + r1) mod n ( index is in bounds)

goal.name: main'vc.27
goal.expl: tmp := a.{i} ( index is in bounds)

goal.name: main'vc.30
goal.expl: a.{i} := (n - tmp) mod n ( index is in bounds)

goal.name: main'vc.54
goal.expl: tmp := a.{i} ( index is in bounds)

goal.name: main'vc.56
goal.expl: tmp := a.{i} ( index is in bounds)

goal.name: main'vc.59
goal.expl: a.{i} := (tmp + r2) mod n ( index is in bounds)

goal.name: main'vc.64
goal.expl: a.{i} := (tmp + r2) mod n ( index is in bounds)

transf.name: assert
transf.arg1: (0 <= mod (l_tmp + l_s1.r2) l_s1.n /\ mod (l_tmp + l_s1.r2) l_s1.n < l_s1.n)

transf.name: assert
transf.arg1: (forall j:int. 0 <= j /\ j < l_s1.n /\ j <> l_i1 -> get (l_s.slots)[l_s.a] j = get (l_s1.slots)[l_s1.a] j)

transf.name: assert
transf.arg1: (0 <= mod (r_tmp + r_s1.r2) r_s1.n /\ mod (r_tmp + r_s1.r2) r_s1.n < r_s1.n)

transf.name: assert
transf.arg1: (forall j:int. 0 <= j /\ j < r_s1.n /\ not j = r_i1 -> get (r_s.slots)[r_s.a] j = get (r_s1.slots)[r_s1.a] j)
